description: stop hook allows done when verify gate clear and the evaluated project tree is clean

run.command: $exitCode = 1; $evalRoot = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.codex/state/evals'; $tmp = New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Join-Path $evalRoot ('eventhub-stop-eval-' + [guid]::NewGuid())); git -C $tmp.FullName init --quiet; try { $env:CODEX_PROJECT_DIR = $tmp.FullName; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 evals/fixtures/stop-completed.json | powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .codex/hooks/stop-gate.ps1; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE } finally { $env:CODEX_PROJECT_DIR = $null; try { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -LiteralPath $tmp.FullName -ErrorAction Stop } catch { } }; powershell -NoProfile -Command "exit $exitCode"
